localSimulation.scope: Bundle closure, bootstrap routing, confirmations, secret-free MCP configuration, and closed failure shapes are checked locally.

liveReviewer.reason: The exact Skills-only portal artifact and clean reviewer-machine run have not yet been submitted or executed.

positive.prompt: After installing NaCl Skills only, inspect this project and explain the local initialization plan without changing anything.
expectedBehavior: Resolve only the active skill bundle and explicit project root.
Return a dry-run plan with NOT_RUN and make no file, Docker, or network mutation.

positive.prompt: Initialize this project as demo-alpha after I provide the exact INIT_LOCAL_GRAPH:demo-alpha confirmation.
positive.precondition: Docker is available, loopback ports are free, and the exact confirmation is present.
expectedBehavior: Run the bundle-relative OS bootstrap with no secret argument.
Create copy-only project graph assets, a per-project container and volume, and a secret-free managed section in project .codex/config.toml.

positive.prompt: Verify the initialized NaCl project from a new task using one read canary.
positive.precondition: A new task has loaded the project-local neo4j MCP generated by nacl-init.
expectedBehavior: Use only the project nacl_neo4j MCP.
Return graph-backed evidence without invoking a package installation doctor or public endpoint.

positive.prompt: Plan a business-analysis context update for this initialized project and show the graph write confirmation first.
positive.precondition: Project MCP and read canary are verified.
expectedBehavior: Select one packaged BA leaf and present the parameterized write plan.
Stop before mutation until the BA approval required by that workflow is supplied.

positive.prompt: Re-run nacl-init for this already initialized project without replacing existing files or secrets.
positive.precondition: The existing graph environment, launcher, MCP entry, project identity, and ports match the requested binding.
expectedBehavior: Reuse byte-identical assets and the existing protected secret.
Read back the same secret-free MCP binding and report an idempotent verified result.

negative.scenario: Invoke a non-init NaCl entry before the project MCP exists.
expectedBehavior: Do not call an absent package or project tool.
Return BLOCKED/PROJECT_MCP_NOT_CONFIGURED and route to nacl-init.

negative.scenario: Ask nacl-init to mutate the project without the exact project-bound confirmation.
expectedBehavior: Make no file, secret, Docker, registry, or network mutation.

negative.scenario: Initialize where .codex/config.toml has a malformed, duplicate, or conflicting nacl_neo4j section, the protected env is unsafe, or a copied launcher differs.
expectedBehavior: Fail closed before replacing the conflicting artifact.
Preserve all existing bytes and report the exact conflict or unsafe-file code.
